Name: EQUIP_INTERFERE_PARAM
Description: Defines how equipped items interfere with character body parts and rendering behavior. Controls culling priorities, visibility thresholds, cloth simulation settings, and group-based rendering/interaction rules for different equipment regions and configurations.

Fields.Name: Interference Setup ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for this equipment interference configuration preset.

Fields.Name: Group 0: Neck Visibility Priority
Fields.Description: Rendering priority for the neck region when resolving culling conflicts.

Fields.Name: Group 0: Right Arm Visibility Priority
Fields.Description: Rendering priority for the right elbow/arm region.

Fields.Name: Group 0: Right Arm Culling Value
Fields.Description: Threshold/value used to determine culling behavior for the right arm.

Fields.Name: Group 0: Left Arm Visibility Priority
Fields.Description: Rendering priority for the left elbow/arm region.

Fields.Name: Group 0: Left Arm Culling Value
Fields.Description: Threshold/value used to determine culling behavior for the left arm.

Fields.Name: Group 0: Waist Visibility Priority
Fields.Description: Rendering priority for the waist region.

Fields.Name: Group 0: Waist Culling Value
Fields.Description: Threshold/value used to determine culling behavior for the waist.

Fields.Name: Group 0: Cloth Control Type
Fields.Description: Defines how cloth simulation or cloth rendering is controlled for this equipment setup.

Fields.Name: Group 0: Culling Group 0
Fields.Description: Bitmask/flag indicating membership in culling group 0.

Fields.Name: Group 0: Culling Group 1
Fields.Description: Bitmask/flag indicating membership in culling group 1.

Fields.Description: Bitmask/flag indicating membership in culling group 2.
